name: Sanger Sequencing Sample Preparation

components.name: 1. Prepare DNA template: miniprep or PCR product

note.en: Plasmid (miniprep): 100–500 ng/µL recommended. PCR product: must be gel-purified (gel_extraction) or ExoSAP-IT cleaned (incubate PCR product with ExoSAP-IT 37°C 15 min → 80°C 15 min inactivate). Residual primers/dNTPs interfere with sequencing.
note.zh: 质粒（miniprep）：100–500 ng/µL。PCR 产物：必须胶回收纯化（gel_extraction）或 ExoSAP-IT 处理（37°C 15 min → 80°C 15 min 灭活）。残留引物/dNTP 会干扰测序。

note.en: Most providers require 3.2 pmol/µL (= 3.2 µM). Common universal primers: M13F (-20): 5'-GTAAAACGACGGCCAGT-3'; M13R: 5'-CAGGAAACAGCTATGAC-3'; T7: 5'-TAATACGACTCACTATA-3'; SP6: 5'-ATTTAGGTGACACTATAG-3'. Custom primers: Tm 55–65°C, length 18–24 nt, GC content 40–60%.
note.zh: 多数服务商要求 3.2 pmol/µL（= 3.2 µM）。通用引物：M13F (-20)、M13R、T7、SP6（见英文）。自定义引物：Tm 55–65°C，长度 18–24 nt，GC 40–60%。

note.en: Premix submission (Genewiz/Azenta): 5 µL DNA (100–500 ng plasmid or 5–20 ng/100 bp PCR) + 5 µL primer (3.2 pmol/µL) = 10 µL total. Tube-only submission: DNA and primer in separate tubes. Follow provider-specific guidelines.
note.zh: 预混提交（Genewiz/Azenta）：5 µL DNA（100–500 ng 质粒或 5–20 ng/100 bp PCR）+ 5 µL 引物（3.2 pmol/µL）= 10 µL。独立管提交：DNA 和引物分管。按服务商说明操作。

components.name: 4. Label tubes clearly; keep on ice; submit same day

note.en: Label with date, sample ID, primer name. Avoid freeze-thaw of sequencing samples. Most sequencing services: results in 24–48 h.
note.zh: 清晰标注日期、样品编号、引物名称。避免冻融。多数测序服务 24–48 h 出结果。

components.name: 5. Analyze results: align chromatogram to expected sequence

note.en: Tools: Benchling, SnapGene Viewer, 4Peaks, ApE. BLAST against reference. Check: (a) expected insert present, (b) correct reading frame, (c) no frame-shift mutations from PCR. Reliable reads typically start at bp 50–100, end at bp 700–900.
note.zh: 工具：Benchling、SnapGene Viewer、4Peaks、ApE。BLAST 比对参考序列。检查：(a) 预期插入片段存在；(b) 正确阅读框；(c) 无 PCR 引入移码突变。可靠读取通常从第 50–100 bp 开始，到第 700–900 bp 结束。

detailedSteps.en: For plasmid DNA: purify with miniprep or midiprep kit. Quantify by NanoDrop (A260/280 should be 1.8–2.0). Dilute to 100–500 ng/µL in nuclease-free water or TE buffer.
detailedSteps.zh: 质粒 DNA：miniprep 或 midiprep 试剂盒纯化。NanoDrop 定量（A260/280 应为 1.8–2.0）。稀释至 100–500 ng/µL（无核酸酶水或 TE 缓冲液）。

detailedSteps.en: For PCR products: run 5 µL on agarose gel to confirm single band. Purify by gel extraction (gel_extraction) or ExoSAP-IT cleanup. ExoSAP-IT: add 2 µL ExoSAP-IT per 5 µL PCR product, incubate 37°C 15 min → 80°C 15 min to inactivate.
detailedSteps.zh: PCR 产物：取 5 µL 琼脂糖凝胶电泳确认单一条带。胶回收（gel_extraction）或 ExoSAP-IT 纯化。ExoSAP-IT：每 5 µL PCR 产物加 2 µL ExoSAP-IT，37°C 15 min → 80°C 15 min 灭活。

detailedSteps.en: Check DNA purity: A260/280 ≥1.8 (minimal protein/salt contamination), A260/230 ≥2.0 (minimal phenol/ethanol contamination). Re-purify if needed.
detailedSteps.zh: 检查 DNA 纯度：A260/280 ≥1.8（蛋白/盐污染少），A260/230 ≥2.0（酚/乙醇污染少）。如需要重新纯化。

detailedSteps.en: Resuspend primers to 100 µM in nuclease-free water (add volume = nmol × 10). Store at −20°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 引物重悬至 100 µM（加入体积 = nmol × 10）。−20°C 保存。

detailedSteps.en: Dilute to 3.2 pmol/µL (3.2 µM) for sequencing submission. For example: 1 µL of 100 µM primer + 30 µL nuclease-free water = 3.2 pmol/µL.
detailedSteps.zh: 稀释至 3.2 pmol/µL（3.2 µM）用于测序提交。例如：1 µL 100 µM 引物 + 30 µL 无核酸酶水 = 3.2 pmol/µL。

detailedSteps.en: Common universal sequencing primers (dilute to 3.2 pmol/µL): M13F (-20): GTAAAACGACGGCCAGT; M13R: CAGGAAACAGCTATGAC; T7: TAATACGACTCACTATA; SP6: ATTTAGGTGACACTATAG.
detailedSteps.zh: 常用通用测序引物（稀释至 3.2 pmol/µL）：M13F (-20)：GTAAAACGACGGCCAGT；M13R：CAGGAAACAGCTATGAC；T7：TAATACGACTCACTATA；SP6：ATTTAGGTGACACTATAG。

detailedSteps.en: For premix submission (most providers): combine in a 1.5 mL tube: 5 µL DNA template + 5 µL primer (3.2 pmol/µL) = 10 µL total per reaction. Mix gently by pipetting. Keep on ice.
detailedSteps.zh: 预混提交（多数服务商）：1.5 mL 管中混合：5 µL DNA 模板 + 5 µL 引物（3.2 pmol/µL）= 每反应 10 µL。移液器轻柔混匀。置于冰上。

detailedSteps.en: Label tubes clearly with sample name, primer name, and date. For multiple samples, use 8-strip tubes. Include a sample submission form per provider instructions.
detailedSteps.zh: 清晰标注管子：样品名、引物名、日期。多样品用 8 连管。按服务商说明填写提交表。

detailedSteps.en: Submit samples on ice or at 4°C (gel ice pack) the same day. Most services deliver results in 24–48 h. For long-distance shipping: dry ice may be required.
detailedSteps.zh: 当日冰上或 4°C（凝胶冰袋）提交样品。多数服务 24–48 h 出结果。远途运输可能需要干冰。

detailedSteps.en: Download chromatogram (.ab1) files. Open in sequence analysis software (Benchling, SnapGene Viewer, 4Peaks, ApE). Check quality scores (QV ≥20 for reliable base calls).
detailedSteps.zh: 下载色谱图文件（.ab1）。序列分析软件打开（Benchling、SnapGene Viewer、4Peaks、ApE）。检查质量分数（QV ≥20 为可靠碱基读取）。

detailedSteps.en: Align to expected reference sequence. Verify: (a) target region sequenced in full, (b) no unexpected mutations, (c) no mixed signals (heterozygote peaks = contamination or polyclonal sample). BLAST any unexpected variants.
detailedSteps.zh: 与预期参考序列比对。验证：(a) 目标区域完整测序，(b) 无意外突变，(c) 无混合信号（杂合峰 = 污染或多克隆样品）。任何意外变体做 BLAST。

briefSteps.en: Prepare DNA (miniprep 100–500 ng/µL or gel-purified PCR) → Dilute primer to 3.2 pmol/µL → Mix 5 µL DNA + 5 µL primer = 10 µL → Label & keep on ice → Submit same day → Analyze .ab1 chromatogram
briefSteps.zh: 制备 DNA（miniprep 100–500 ng/µL 或胶回收 PCR）→ 引物稀释至 3.2 pmol/µL → 5 µL DNA + 5 µL 引物混匀 = 10 µL → 标注冰上保存 → 当日提交 → 分析 .ab1 色谱图

note.en: Diluted primers at 3.2 pmol/µL can be stored at −20°C for up to 1 month; avoid repeated freeze-thaw
note.zh: 3.2 pmol/µL 稀释引物 −20°C 可保存 1 个月；避免反复冻融

note.en: Prepared sequencing samples can be stored at 4°C overnight or −20°C for up to 1 week before submission
note.zh: 制备好的测序样品可 4°C 过夜或 −20°C 保存最多 1 周后再提交

notes.en: Read length: typical Sanger = 700–1,000 bp per reaction. For long inserts: design primers every 600–700 bp (primer walking). Troubleshooting: no reads → check DNA purity (A260/280 ≥1.8, no salt/ethanol contamination); noisy reads → secondary structure (use DMSO additive); short reads → primer-template mismatch.
notes.zh: 读取长度：典型 Sanger = 700–1,000 bp/反应。长插入片段：每 600–700 bp 设计一个引物（引物步进法）。排查：无读取→检查 DNA 纯度（A260/280 ≥1.8，无盐/乙醇污染）；噪声大→二级结构（加 DMSO 添加剂）；读取短→引物-模板不匹配。

ref: Sanger et al. (1977) PNAS 74:5463–5467; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning 3rd ed.; Genewiz/Azenta Sequencing Guidelines

materials.name: 1.5 mL microcentrifuge tubes or strip tubes

usage.en: Prepare DNA samples and primers for Sanger sequencing submission.
usage.zh: 准备 DNA 样品和引物，提交 Sanger 测序。
